title: HP ProLiant RAID controller discovery fix (Gen11/iLO6)
name: hp_proliant_fix
description: Drop-in override for the built-in hp_proliant_da_cntlr check. On HPE ProLiant Gen11 systems managed via iLO 6 the controller table (cpqDaCntlrTable) contains a phantom/placeholder row (typically index 0) with all-zero condition/status cells. The shipped check discovers a service for it and then reports it as UNKNOWN ("Controller not found in SNMP data") forever. This package ships a fixed plugin under the same namespace path (cmk/plugins/hp_proliant) so it cleanly shadows the built-in one and skips all-zero rows already at discovery time; behaviour for real controllers is unchanged. Remove once fixed upstream.
author: Kuhn & Rueß GmbH
